evidence.path: YAPPC product scaffold → Data-Cloud entity API
evidence.validation: YAPPC scaffold operations use Data-Cloud SDK for entity persistence
evidence.tenantIsolation: Tenant ID from YAPPC context propagated to Data-Cloud entity operations
evidence.noDuplicatePath: No direct database access from YAPPC; all persistence through Data-Cloud API
evidence.eventEmission: Data-Cloud CDC events emitted for YAPPC entity changes
evidence.auditTrail: Audit events include YAPPC operation context and Data-Cloud entity metadata

evidence.path: YAPPC product discovery → Data-Cloud query API
evidence.validation: YAPPC discovery operations use Data-Cloud query API with tenant scoping
evidence.tenantIsolation: Query filters include tenant ID from YAPPC context
evidence.noDuplicatePath: No direct database queries from YAPPC; all queries through Data-Cloud API
evidence.eventEmission: Query operations logged through Data-Cloud observability
evidence.auditTrail: Audit events capture query context and results

evidence.scenario: YAPPC agent invocation through governed dispatcher
evidence.validation: YAPPC agent requests routed through GovernedAgentDispatcher
evidence.tenantIsolation: Tenant context propagated through dispatcher to agent execution
evidence.noDirectBypass: No direct TypedAgent instantiation in YAPPC code
evidence.policyEnforcement: Side-effect policies enforced before agent execution
evidence.eventEmission: Agent execution events emitted through AEP event bridge
evidence.auditTrail: Audit events include agent ID, capability, and execution context

evidence.path: YAPPC agent definitions → AgentCapabilityRegistry → AEP central registry
evidence.validation: YAPPC agent capabilities registered through AEP central registry
evidence.noDuplicatePath: No local agent capability registry in YAPPC
evidence.contractValidation: Agent capabilities validated against AEP capability contracts
evidence.eventEmission: Capability registration events emitted for audit
evidence.auditTrail: Audit events capture capability metadata and registration context

evidence.path: Data-Cloud CDC events → AEP event bridge → Agent runtime
evidence.validation: Data-Cloud CDC events trigger agent execution through AEP event bridge
evidence.tenantIsolation: Tenant ID from Data-Cloud events propagated to agent context
evidence.noDirectBypass: No direct agent invocation from Data-Cloud; all through AEP event bridge
evidence.capabilityResolution: Agent capabilities resolved through AEP central registry
evidence.policyEnforcement: Side-effect policies enforced for event-driven agent execution
evidence.eventEmission: Agent execution events emitted back to Data-Cloud event plane
evidence.auditTrail: Audit events link Data-Cloud events to agent execution results

evidence.validation: Data-Cloud agent registry syncs with AEP central registry
evidence.noDuplicatePath: No separate agent registry in Data-Cloud; uses AEP central registry
evidence.contractValidation: Agent definitions validated against AEP contracts
evidence.eventEmission: Registry sync events emitted for audit
evidence.auditTrail: Audit events capture registry sync operations and conflicts

evidence.scenario: YAPPC scaffold operation triggers Data-Cloud event which invokes agent
evidence.path: YAPPC scaffold → Data-Cloud entity → CDC event → AEP event bridge → Agent execution
evidence.validation: End-to-end flow validated with tenant context propagation
evidence.tenantIsolation: Tenant ID maintained across YAPPC → Data-Cloud → Agent boundaries
evidence.noDuplicatePath: No shortcuts bypassing any layer; all through proper APIs
evidence.capabilityResolution: Agent capabilities resolved through AEP central registry
evidence.policyEnforcement: Side-effect policies enforced at agent execution boundary
evidence.eventEmission: Events emitted at each boundary (YAPPC, Data-Cloud, AEP, Agent)
evidence.auditTrail: Correlated audit trail across all three systems
evidence.degradedBehavior: Graceful degradation when agent execution fails; entity still persisted

evidence.scenario: Agent execution result written back to Data-Cloud and consumed by YAPPC
evidence.path: Agent execution → AEP event bridge → Data-Cloud entity update → YAPPC discovery
evidence.validation: Agent results flow back through proper channels
evidence.tenantIsolation: Tenant ID maintained throughout reverse flow
evidence.noDuplicatePath: No direct agent-to-YAPPC communication; all through Data-Cloud
evidence.eventEmission: Result events emitted at each boundary
evidence.auditTrail: Correlated audit trail for result propagation
evidence.degradedBehavior: YAPPC operates with last-known-good state when result unavailable

noDuplicatePersistence.evidence: YAPPC does not implement its own persistence layer; all data operations go through Data-Cloud API

noDuplicateGovernance.evidence: YAPPC does not implement its own agent governance; all agent operations go through AEP governed dispatcher

noDirectAgentBypass.evidence: No direct TypedAgent instantiation found in YAPPC codebase; all agent execution through GovernedAgentDispatcher

tenantIsolation.evidence: Tenant ID propagated consistently across YAPPC → Data-Cloud → Agent boundaries with validation at each layer

eventCorrelation.evidence: Correlation IDs maintained across all three systems for end-to-end tracing
